items.title: Jim Cramer Recommends Buying Boeing
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer commented on. A caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the company during the lightning round, and he remarked, “Here’s my thoughts on Boeing, [buy, buy, buy, buy, buy, buy]. Fair enough?” The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) designs, manufactures, and services commercial airplanes, military aircraft, satellites, […]

items.title: Aviation Capital Group Announces Delivery of One Boeing 737-8 MAX to Virgin Australia
items.description: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif., August 13, 2025--Aviation Capital Group LLC (ACG), a premier global full-service aircraft asset manager, announced the delivery of one Boeing 737-8 MAX aircraft to Virgin Australia. This is the third and final aircraft to deliver to the carrier from ACG’s order book with Boeing.

items.title: Boeing Defense Union Calls on Lawmakers to Intervene in Strike
items.description: The IAM Union, which represents 3,200 workers currently on strike, said it had written letters to senators and representatives to press Boeing to return to the bargaining table, the group said in a statement on Wednesday.  A Boeing representative didn’t have an immediate comment.  The action adds pressure to Boeing’s turnaround efforts with the defense and space division contributing about a third of the company’s revenue.

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Lockheed Martin's, Boeing and L3Harris Technologies
items.description: Lockheed's space unit rebounds with Q2 growth, eyeing long-term gains from Artemis funding and classified contracts despite near-term delays.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway 13F Preview: Did Buffett Trim Apple—And Will The Mystery Stock Be Revealed?
items.description: Warren Buffett has requested confidentiality in a new Berkshire Hathaway position. Will investors find out the stock Thursday?
